ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing The Estate
Off Calendar Apr-25-2022 Continued To Jun-13-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Heidi Clerc, via CourtCall, for Fred Berquist, Personal Representative.

The court queries counsel regarding the status of this matter and the Inventory and Appraisal ("I&A"). Counsel reports of a pending civil action brought by one of the creditors and that discussions regarding ADR have just begun in that matter. Counsel also reports of an inflated valuation in the I&A since there are pending estate taxes due in Washington State. Counsel requests a 45-day continuance to deal with the preceding issues. The court advises that it will grant the continuance as requested but that it is expecting a Petition to Approve Report on Status of Administration be formally filed with the court by then.

The Status on Close of Estate is continued to Jun-13-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Gomez. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar May-14-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Heidi Clerc, Esq., counsel for Fred Bergquist, Petitioner (appearing by video conference).

Court and counsel discuss whether full or limited authority is required for the administration of this estate. The Court notes that if full authority is requested, bond will be set at $4.035 million but if limited authority is requested, bond will be set at $35,000. After further discussion, Ms. Clerc elects to proceed with limited authority.

The Court, receiving no objection to the petition, appoints Fred E. Bergquist the administrator of the Estate of John L. Bergquist with limited authority under the Independent Administration of Estates Act. Bond is set at $35,000. The Court sets status for closing of the estate for April 25, 2022 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. If the Petition for Final Distribution or Petition and Report to Approve Administration of the Estate is on file one week before that date, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Bailiff: Deputy Tauscher. Reporter: Not Reported. (D204)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-29-2021 Continued To Apr-19-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
